oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Make Your Own Cushion Sand Perch
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Vollmer, Daniel
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 47 Number 1 (December 2020).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Make Your Own Cushion Sand PerchBy Daniel Vollmer Acadiana Bird Club President 7 KHUHDUHFXUUHQWO\PDQ\W\SHVRIELUGSHUFKHVFRPSRVHGRIGLIIHUHQWPDWHULDOVDYDLODEOHRQWKHPDUNHW $WWDFKLQJSHUFKHVWRRQHVLGHRIWKHFDJHRUFDJHGRRUFDQEHGRQHXVLQJDVFUHZDQGZDVKHUVFUHZHGLQWR WKHSHUFKRULQVWDOOLQJDKDQJHUEROWLQWRWKHSHUFKDQGDWWDFKLQJLWZLWKDQXWDQGZDVKHU3HUFKPDWHULDOVDUH XVXDOO\ZRRGGRZHOVRUWUHHEUDQFKHVSODVWLFRUFRQFUHWH6DQGFDQEHDGGHGWRFRDWWKHVXUIDFHWRDFWOLNH DQDLOILOH7KHEHOLHILVWKDWWKHSHUFKZLOOILOHWKHELUG¶VQDLOVZKHQWKHELUGLVPRYLQJLWVIHHWRQLWZLWKRXW \RXKDYLQJWRFOLSWKHP&DJHVW\SLFDOO\FRPHZLWKDVORWWHGZRRGHQGRZHOSHUFKWKDWILWVEHWZHHQWZR ZDOOVRIDFDJH7KHVHSHUFKHVFDQEHHDVLO\UHPRYHGIRUFOHDQLQJRUUHSODFLQJ)LJXUHVKRZVWKUHHPHWK RGVIRUDWWDFKLQJSHUFKHV&ŝŐƵƌĞϭ͗ƩĂĐŚŝŶŐWĞƌĐŚĞƐ ;ϭͿ^ĐƌĞǁĂŶĚtĂƐŚĞƌ&XUUHQWO\WKHUHLVQRNQRZQVWDQGDUGVL]HIRUDVORWWHGSHUFKWKDWZLOODWWDFKIURPERWKLQVLGHHQGVRIDELUG FDJHEHFDXVHFDJHVFRPHLQYDULRXVGLPHQVLRQV6RPHWLPHVLWFDQEHGLIILFXOWWRILQGWKHULJKWVL]HVORWWHG SHUFKIRU\RXUFDJH2QHSUREOHPZLWKPDNLQJDVORWWHGSHUFKLVWKDWERWKHQGVPXVWEHQHDUO\SDUDOOHORULW ZLOOQRWDWWDFKWRWKHSDUDOOHOEDUVRIWKHFDJH$VLPSOHMLJFDQEHPDGHWRHDVLO\PDNHDVORWWHGSHUFKIRU \RXUELUG$FRSLQJVDZRUDWDEOHVDZFDQEHXVHGEXWWKHSURFHGXUHEHORZGHVFULEHVXVLQJDFRSLQJVDZ$ FRSLQJVDZFDQEHHDVLO\SXUFKDVHGRQOLQHRUDW\RXUORFDOKDUGZDUHVWRUHIRUDERXW8VLQJDWDEOHVDZLV QRWGHVFULEHGEHFDXVHPDQ\SHRSOHGRQRWKDYHDWDEOHVDZZKLFKFRVWVVLJ QLILFDQWO\PRUHDQGUHTXLUHVPRUHURRPWRVWRUH,WLVDOVRPRUHGDQJHURXV7RPDNHWKHMLJDWDEOHVDZLVUHTXLUHG,I\RXDUHQRWLQWHUHVWHGLQPDNLQJ \RXURZQMLJRQHFDQEHSXUFKDVHGDWDFDGLDQDELUGFOXELQFFRPXQGHUWKH ³VKRS´WDEIRUZLWKVKLSSLQJ7KH\ZLOOHYHQVHQGHQRXJKPHVK VDQGZLWK\RXURUGHULQFDVH\RXZRXOGOLNHWRPDNHDVDQGSHUFKClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
